result:
All tasks complete. Here's a summary of what was implemented:

## Stream API: Notification Orchestration API Contract + Validation Layer

### New files
- `src/gateway/protocol/schema/notifications.ts` ŌĆö TypeBox schemas for the entire notification subsystem
- `src/gateway/server-methods/notifications.ts` ŌĆö 8 gateway method handlers with full validation
- `src/gateway/protocol/notifications-validators.test.ts` ŌĆö 33 validation tests (all passing)

### Modified files
- `src/gateway/protocol/schema/types.ts` ŌĆö 16 new type aliases (NotificationRule, event types, params, results)
- `src/gateway/protocol/schema/protocol-schemas.ts` ŌĆö 18 schemas registered in the protocol registry
- `src/gateway/protocol/schema.ts` ŌĆö barrel re-export added
- `src/gateway/protocol/index.ts` ŌĆö 8 AJV validators + schema/type re-exports
- `src/gateway/server-methods.ts` ŌĆö notificationsHandlers registered
- `src/gateway/method-scopes.ts` ŌĆö notifications.list/get/history ŌåÆ READ, notifications.test ŌåÆ WRITE, notifications.create/update/delete/mute ŌåÆ ADMIN
- `src/gateway/server-broadcast.ts` ŌĆö event scope guard comment (notification events visible to all operators)

### API Surface

| Method | Scope | Description |
|---|---|---|
| `notifications.list` | read | List rules with pagination/filters |
| `notifications.get` | read | Get a single rule by ID |
| `notifications.create` | admin | Create a notification rule |
| `notifications.update` | admin | Patch an existing rule |
| `notifications.delete` | admin | Delete a rule |
| `notifications.test` | write | Test delivery for a rule |
| `notifications.mute` | admin | Mute/unmute a rule |
| `notifications.history` | read | View delivery log history |

### Broadcast Events
- `notification.delivered` ŌĆö fired when a notification is successfully delivered
- `notification.failed` ŌĆö fired when delivery fails

### Integration points for other streams
- **State/persistence**: Handlers need a `NotificationStore` injected via `GatewayRequestContext` (similar to `context.cron`)
- **UI**: Import types from `src/gateway/protocol/index.ts`, subscribe to broadcast events
- **Integration tests**: Schema validation covered; E2E tests should exercise the full WebSocket RPC flow
